prompt: Add color to differentiate each type of furniture, using distinct hues for chairs, tables, and plants.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Introduce color to the line-drawn furniture elements to visually differentiate their types. Assign a distinct color to all chairs, a different distinct color to all tables, and another distinct color to all plant elements present in the image.
objects: Chairs with a distinct uniform color
Tables with a distinct uniform color
Plant elements with a distinct uniform color
